bug.description: integer overflow leading to incorrect computation or wraparound

prompt:
There is a integer overflow leading to incorrect computation or wraparound downstream of function nfapi_vnf_p7_config_create in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf/src/vnf_p7_interface.c:37.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
